title: umb4.2-mapping: Meshtastic-style mapping for KISS LCI
description: Define mapping from KISS frames to LICHEN local CoAP/IPv6/control actions and vice versa. Specify which KISS CMD/port carries IPv6 datagrams for LCI, which for control (config, status, keys), error mapping. Ensure compatibility with existing tools. Produce table similar to t2hn mapping. --parent=project-LICHEN-umb4 --type=task --priority=2 --labels=app-interface,kiss,zephyr,codereview
notes: Mapping defined: KISS_CMD_DATA (0x00) carries IPv6 for LCI CoAP (injected via ble_ingress); KISS_CMD_SETHW (0x60) for control (config, status, keys). Schema: standard KISS with no extensions. Transport: BLE UART (existing LCI service) or serial. Handlers: RX write detects KISS FEND+CMD, calls kiss_decode, dispatches. Errors: EMSGSIZE, EINVAL logged, dropped (no silent fail for tools). Tests: added to ZTEST in ble_uart_test. Docs updated in comments and spec/kiss-framing.md (but no new file). 3 codereview passes per chunk completed with all findings fixed and closed. All children worked in parallel via subagents (research, mapping, schema, transport, framing=encode/decode, handlers, errors, tests, docs). umb4 clean.
